bead.title: bench-pr-A.1: bash runner skeleton + arg parsing + YAML matrix expansion
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The parent bead replaces cmd/bench/matrix.go (~2232 LOC Go) with a bash runner at scripts/benchmark/benchmark. This child delivers the runner's outer shell: arg parsing, subcommand dispatch, YAML loading, and matrix expansion — without per-cell execution, adapters, or Docker.

ROOT CAUSE
cmd/bench/matrix.go:1105 puts repo root on host PYTHONPATH so Harbor can import scripts.benchmark.harbor_adapters.*, forcing host Python. The Go runner also owns arg parsing (cmd/bench/matrix.go arg-handling block) and matrix expansion (profile × task × rep). We need a bash entry point that can stand alone before adapters/Docker land.

PROPOSED FIX
Create scripts/benchmark/benchmark (bash, no extension, +x). Implement:
  - Subcommand dispatch: profiles | bench-sets | task-executors | harness-adapters | validate | preflight | (default = run).
  - Run-mode flags exactly as parent spec: --profile, --bench-set, --plan, --force-rerun, --retry-invalid, --reps, --jobs, --max-cost-usd, --out.
  - YAML loaders that shell out to `yq -o=json` for profile, bench-set, concurrency-group files.
  - Matrix expansion: resolve `tasks_from:` (relative to bench-set file) and inline `tasks:`; default task_executor to `harbor` when framework == terminal-bench; emit ordered cell list to stdout as JSON when --plan is set.
  - listing subcommands (profiles, bench-sets, task-executors, harness-adapters) print names found on disk; stub validate/preflight that exits 0 with a 'not yet implemented' note (filled in by sibling A.4).

NON-SCOPE
- No per-cell execution loop, no adapter invocation, no Docker. Those land in siblings A.2/A.3/A.4.
- No removal of cmd/bench/matrix.go in this child.
- Preserve every parent non-scope item.

AC
1. scripts/benchmark/benchmark exists, is executable, and `./benchmark --help` prints subcommand+flag usage matching the parent spec.
2. `./benchmark --plan --profile P --bench-set B` emits a JSON cell list with correct profile×task×rep expansion including `tasks_from:` resolution; covered by TestBenchmarkRunnerPlanExpansion (Go test in cli/ that shells out to the script against fixture YAML).
3. Unknown subcommand or missing required flag exits non-zero with a usage hint; covered by TestBenchmarkRunnerArgParsing.
4. cd cli && go test ./... passes.
5. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
bead.acceptance:
1. scripts/benchmark/benchmark exists, executable, --help documents subcommands+flags.
2. TestBenchmarkRunnerPlanExpansion verifies --plan output for profile×task×rep with tasks_from resolution.
3. TestBenchmarkRunnerArgParsing verifies unknown-subcommand and missing-flag exit codes.
4. cd cli && go test ./... passes.
5. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
